title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Enable Now - Allow Once
scenario: Test location sharing dialogue on iOS after onboarding with "Don't Allow" selected, navigating to App settings > Find My Device and interacting with "Enable Now" and "Allow Once" permission prompts.
steps: 1. Onboard the user with 'Don't Allow' selected for location permissions.
3. Navigate to App settings > Find My Device.
4. Interact with the location permission prompt by selecting 'Enable Now'.
5. Interact with the location permission prompt by selecting 'Allow Once'.
expected: The Location Sharing dialogue should function correctly, allowing the user to grant location permissions via 'Enable Now' or 'Allow Once' after initially selecting 'Don't Allow' during onboarding.
